company.name_jp: 株式会社ビットグローバルユニット

research_notes: Researched on 2026-06-26. Company established 1997-07-18 (as Total Net Create, renamed 2020-07). Capital: 23 million JPY. Employees: 24 (as of 2025-01-01). Located in Yokohama Minato Mirai. Officers found: CEO 立見髙浩, Directors 鈴木雅巳 and 中馬智親, Auditor 田所主裕. Subsidiary of Bit Holdings.
